title: payena lucida
intro: Payena lucida, also known as the shining payena, is a type of plant species in the family Sapotaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Payena lucida include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Payena lucida can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
